title: Executive Order 9775—Establishing the Federal Committee On Highway Safety

flags.justification: A multi-agency representative committee with purely coordination and encouragement functions, no binding regulatory authority.
Functions are limited to coordination and encouragement, reasonably bounded.
A coordination body with no binding compliance regime.
No compliance regime exists for an incentive structure to attach to.
A standing coordination body for an ongoing government function, evergreen by nature.
This creates a new coordination structure rather than removing any existing oversight.
A coordination body with no third-party compliance regime.
Establishes a durable, broad, multi-agency coordination structure for an important, enduring public-safety concern.
Broad, inclusive membership with each agency providing its own representative, a well-designed, non-conflicting structure.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.
